meta.purpose: Supplier inquiry and datasheet request checklist for confirming proposed IoTEdges product model specifications before SEO/product page publication.

how_to_use: Send the relevant model checklist to hardware suppliers or OEM/ODM manufacturers.
Request datasheet, user manual, configuration screenshots, certification files, and sample register/configuration examples.
Mark each item as confirmed, conditional, unsupported, or unknown after supplier response.
Update capability-check-matrix.json and product-model-definition-draft.json before publishing product claims.

general_supplier_questions.question: Do you support OEM/ODM branding, custom enclosure label, packaging, and model number customization?
general_supplier_questions.why_it_matters: IoTEdges may need branded export products.

general_supplier_questions.question: What are the MOQ, sample price, production lead time, and warranty terms?
general_supplier_questions.why_it_matters: Needed for first product rollout and sourcing risk.

general_supplier_questions.question: Can firmware functions, MQTT payload format, cloud endpoint, logo, web UI, or default settings be customized?
general_supplier_questions.why_it_matters: Important for IoTEdges differentiation and platform integration.

general_supplier_questions.question: Please provide datasheet, user manual, API/protocol manual, Modbus register/configuration examples, and configuration UI screenshots.
general_supplier_questions.why_it_matters: Required for product capability confirmation and SEO claim validation.

general_supplier_questions.question: Which certifications are available? Please provide files for CE, FCC, RoHS, UKCA, UL, ATEX, IECEx, carrier approvals, or other certificates if available.
general_supplier_questions.why_it_matters: Certification claims must not be published without proof.

general_supplier_questions.question: Which countries or regions have been shipped to, and which LTE bands or power/certification versions are available for each market?
general_supplier_questions.why_it_matters: Export SEO and product pages must avoid unsupported regional claims.

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: Industrial IoT Gateway with Ethernet, RS485, Modbus RTU/TCP and MQTT
model_checklists.request_summary: We are looking for an industrial IoT gateway that supports Modbus RTU/TCP data collection and MQTT publishing for energy meters, solar inverters, PLCs, sensors and factory equipment.

must_confirm.question: How many Ethernet ports are available, and are they 10/100M or Gigabit? Can the device work as WAN/LAN or only LAN?
How many RS485 ports are available? Are they isolated? What baud rates, parity, stop bits and serial formats are supported?
Is RS232 available on this model or only on another variant?
Does the gateway work as Modbus RTU master/client? Can it poll multiple slave devices?
Does the gateway support Modbus TCP client polling? Does it also support Modbus TCP server mode?
Which MQTT versions are supported? Can it publish to a custom broker with configurable host, port, username and password?
Is the MQTT payload JSON? Can topic names, tag names, units, scaling, data types and payload format be customized?
Does it support MQTT over TLS, CA/client certificates, HTTPS, VPN, user roles or password protection?
What is the exact power input range, operating temperature, dimensions, mounting method and enclosure material?
Which certificates are available for this exact model?

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: 4G Industrial IoT Gateway with RS485 Modbus and MQTT
model_checklists.request_summary: We are looking for a cellular industrial gateway for remote Modbus devices, solar sites, pump stations, fuel tanks and environmental monitoring stations.

must_confirm.question: Which LTE module is used? Please provide supported LTE bands, 2G/3G fallback if any, and regional versions.
What SIM type is supported? Does the configuration UI allow APN, username, password and PIN settings?
What antenna connector is used? Is external antenna included? Are high-gain or outdoor antennas available?
Is Ethernet available for local configuration, WAN backup or LAN device polling?
How many RS485 ports are available, and does the device support Modbus RTU master/client polling?
Can the gateway publish Modbus data to MQTT through the 4G network? How does it reconnect after network drop?
Does it support local data buffering and resend after cellular interruption?
Does it support OpenVPN, IPsec, WireGuard or other VPN methods?
What are power input range, operating temperature, humidity range, enclosure rating and mounting method?
Are there carrier approvals, CE/FCC/RoHS or other certificates for the cellular model?

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: Advanced Edge IoT Gateway with Modbus, MQTT and Local Edge Features
model_checklists.request_summary: We are evaluating an advanced gateway for OEM machine remote diagnostics, factory edge data filtering and PLC-to-cloud applications.

must_confirm.question: Please provide CPU model, RAM, flash/storage, OS and available user storage.
Does the gateway support local rules, scripts, Node-RED, Docker, custom apps or other edge logic?
Please confirm support for Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, MQTT, OPC UA, BACnet, CAN and PLC protocols. Specify client/server mode for each.
Can the gateway store data locally and resend after network recovery? What is the storage limit?
Does it support TLS certificates, VPN, firewall, user roles, SSH control, audit logs or secure firmware updates?
Does it support remote configuration, OTA firmware upgrade, logs, device health monitoring or fleet management?
Please list all Ethernet, RS485, RS232, USB, CAN, DI/DO/AI and antenna interfaces.

red_flags: edge features are only marketing words

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: Industrial RTU with DI/DO/AI, RS485 Modbus and Ethernet
model_checklists.request_summary: We are looking for a base industrial RTU for field signal collection, alarms, pump/tank/building equipment monitoring and SCADA-style remote telemetry.

must_confirm.question: How many DI channels are available? Are they dry contact, wet contact, pulse input or configurable?
How many DO/relay outputs are available? What are voltage/current ratings and isolation details?
How many AI channels are available? Do they support 4-20mA, 0-10V, 0-5V, RTD or thermocouple?
What are AI resolution, accuracy and sampling rate?
Does it support Modbus RTU master/slave? How many RS485 ports are available?
Does it support Ethernet? Which protocols can be used over Ethernet?
Can the RTU define local alarm rules, thresholds, delay timers and output actions?
Does it support local data logging? What is the storage capacity and export method?
What are power input range, operating temperature, dimensions, mounting method and enclosure rating?

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: 4G RTU with DI/DO/AI, RS485 Modbus, MQTT and Cellular Telemetry
model_checklists.request_summary: We are looking for a 4G RTU for remote pump stations, fuel tanks, pipelines, telecom towers and environmental monitoring stations.

must_confirm.question: Which LTE module is used? Please provide supported LTE bands and regional variants.
What SIM type is supported, and can APN settings be configured in the UI?
Can it send IO and Modbus data to a custom MQTT broker over 4G?
Please list DI, DO/relay, AI, AO and supported signal types.
Does it support 4-20mA and 0-10V sensors? What accuracy and resolution?
Does it support Modbus RTU master/client over RS485?
Can it trigger alarms from thresholds, DI status, communication failure or sensor abnormal values?
Does it log data locally and resend when cellular network recovers?
What antenna connector, antenna type, enclosure rating and mounting options are available?

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: High-IO Industrial RTU for Multi-Signal Remote Monitoring
model_checklists.request_summary: We are evaluating a high-channel RTU for wastewater treatment, substations, factory utilities, data centers and multi-sensor remote sites.

must_confirm.question: Please list maximum DI, DO/relay, AI, AO and expansion module options.
Are IO channels isolated? What surge/ESD protection is available?
Does it support 2 or more RS485 ports? Can they poll different Modbus networks?
Does it support Ethernet, 4G LTE, MQTT, Modbus TCP or other uplink options?
Can it run local logic, interlocks, threshold alarms and output actions?
Does it support timestamped data logs and event records?

red_flags: high IO count only available through custom firmware

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: Modbus Remote IO Module with DI/DO/AI/AO Variants
model_checklists.request_summary: We are looking for Modbus Remote IO modules for distributed signal collection in factories, water systems, buildings and SCADA projects.

must_confirm.question: Which IO variants are available: DI, DO, relay, AI, AO, mixed IO, temperature input?
Does the module support Modbus RTU slave over RS485? Please provide register map.
Is there an Ethernet/Modbus TCP version?
For AI/AO models, what signal types are supported: 4-20mA, 0-10V, RTD, thermocouple?
Are IO and communication ports isolated? What surge/ESD protection is included?
What is the power input range, operating temperature and mounting method?

model_checklists.supplier_request_title: Industrial LoRaWAN Gateway for Agriculture, Environmental and Smart City Monitoring
model_checklists.request_summary: We are evaluating a LoRaWAN gateway for long-range wireless sensor monitoring in agriculture, environment, cold chain, water and smart city projects.

must_confirm.question: Which LoRaWAN version is supported? Does it support Class A/B/C devices?
Which frequency variants are available: EU868, US915, AU915, AS923, CN470 or others?
How many LoRa channels are supported?
Does it support Ethernet, WiFi, 4G LTE or PoE backhaul?
Does it include a built-in network server, or does it connect to external LoRaWAN network servers?
Can data be forwarded to MQTT or a custom application server?
Is an outdoor IP-rated version available? What is the exact IP rating and operating temperature?
What antenna connector and antenna gain options are available?

response_scoring.score_3: Confirmed with datasheet/manual/screenshot/certificate and supplier can provide sample.
response_scoring.score_2: Supplier confirms in writing but evidence is incomplete.
response_scoring.score_1: Supplier says it may be possible through customization or selected variant.
response_scoring.score_0: Unsupported, unclear, or supplier cannot provide documentation.

next_actions: Send model-specific checklist to shortlisted suppliers.
Collect datasheets, manuals, configuration screenshots and certificates.
Score each supplier response using response_scoring.
Update capability-check-matrix.json and product-model-definition-draft.json with confirmed data.
Only publish final product pages after minimum acceptance criteria are satisfied.
